task:
Import /home/user/Pictures/multi_inst_source.jpg into the darktable library.

Enable the 'exposure' module at +0.5 EV, then create a second instance of the 'exposure' module with different settings (e.g., -0.3 EV) so the history contains two distinct exposure operations. Apply the tag 'multi_instance' to the image and export it as a JPEG to /home/user/Pictures/multi_inst_result.jpg.

verification.description: exposure module applied at least twice (multiple instances)
